title: PORTA PUZZLE Original - Large Puzzle Mat & Board, 2 Sorters & Organisers - Portable, Lightweight & Easy to Store Non-Slip Felt Jigsaw Mats - Up to 1000 Pieces Portapuzzle Board - 57x 80cm
features: ROBUST PUZZLE BOARD: The Puzzlemates mat provides a perfect jigsaw puzzle board for 1000 pieces, Experience a dedicated robust surface for building, sorting and storing your favourite jigsaw puzzles
MULTIFUNCTIONAL ACCESSORY: The Portapuzzle Board goes beyond just a jigsaw mat;it's a versatile accessory and storage solution for puzzle enthusiasts, designed to enhance your puzzling sessions
SAFE STORAGE: Enjoy worry-free transportation with the lightweight design, ensuring your unfinished puzzle stays secure and flat, With a non slip felt surface to ensure secure puzzle placement
LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE: The foldable design makes it easy to store and carry, A portable puzzle sorter that offers unmatched convenience for puzzlers on the go, so that you can take it anywhere
JUMBO PUZZLE COMPATIBILITY: Specifically crafted to accommodate all Jumbo 1,000 piece puzzles, guaranteeing a perfect fit and a seamless puzzling experience, With a generous size, measuring 57 x 80cm
description: From the manufacturer Jumbo Puzzle Mates Puzzle Mates from Jumbo are the perfect accessories for any puzzle fan. This high-quality collection includes a puzzle folder, puzzle mat, puzzle roll and puzzle board – all of which make it easy to put your jigsaw away when you've finished puzzling. In addition to puzzle organizers and mats, the range also includes a puzzle sorter that helps you sort the puzzle pieces and keep them separate while puzzling. Puzzle Mates are indispensable accessories for all puzzle fans and are suitable for jigsaw puzzles from 500 to 3000 pieces. Essential Accessories for All Puzzle Fans Ideal Puzzle Accessory Create, sort, and store your jigsaw puzzles with the Puzzle Mates Portapuzzle Standard. Simply place your jigsaw on the middle board of the Portapuzzle while puzzling and use the supplied side panels to sort individual puzzle pieces. This puzzle folder is the perfect puzzle accessory for jigsaw puzzles of up to 1000 pieces. When you’re done with puzzling, but your jigsaw isn’t quite finished all you need to do is close the folder and safely store it away until next time. Easy to Store Due to the separate board and the unique inner lining of the puzzle folder, all puzzle pieces remain safely in place, so if you have finished puzzling for the day you can store it in the puzzle folder in 3 easy steps: 1. The Portapuzzle contains a separate board for over the puzzle, which you place in the middle on top of the unfinished puzzle. 2. Remove the puzzle pieces from the side boards and place the side boards on the middle panel. 3. Close the folder with the Velcro and store it away! Advantages of the Portapuzzle Standard Thanks to the thin design of the Portapuzzle it can easily be slid under a couch or behind a cupboard, so your unfinished puzzle will never get in the way again. The Velcro closure and felt cover of the puzzle folder ensure that all puzzle pieces remain securely in place. In addition, the Velcro makes it easy to take the jigsaw puzzle with you.
